article.title: Just 1 command that changed my whole life
article.preview_text:
The /goal Command made me useless and that was the point.
For two years I have been the bottleneck in every Claude Code session.
Type a prompt, wait for the output, review it, type the next prompt,

body.text:
Claude Code、大規模コードベースでの公式ベストプラクティスが出てた

- CLAUDE .md はルートを薄く、ローカルな規約はサブディレクトリに書く
- 作業はリポジトリルートやなくサブディレクトリで始める
- ハーネスは基本 CLAUDE .md → hooks → skills → plugins → MCP の順で積む
- stop hook

title.string_value: How Claude Code works in large codebases: Best practices and where to start | Claude

body.text:
They use these things called “proxy stations”
Basically someone buys huge amounts of API credits/accounts, routes everything through their own servers, then resells it for dirt cheap.

only downside is your chats/prompts are probably getting logged somewhere too

parent.text:
Chinese students are buying GPT-5.4/5.5 and Claude API access from Xianyu/Taobao proxy sellers for almost 96-97% cheaper 

People are apparently burning 100M+ tokens a day for like $1 and vibecoding nonstop. https://t.co/jUExdSTyTl

body.text:
纯前端项目，14×14 网格上随便放建筑、树、地形，总共 75 个手绘风素材。渲染用了分层缓存，不动的瓦片不重绘，只刷新正在操作的部分，静态画面几乎零开销。触屏和鼠标都能用，手机布局会自动适配刘海屏。

https://t.co/QRwnRoJzh7 https://t.co/WF4Qnbvn9J
